chunks.text: URDER SHELT THE HIGH COUKT OF SINDH CIRCUIT CUURT AT LARIANA Ind Appeal No 0[2017 ٦٢ ٦ ١ Orde سith signatug of Judge For orders on office objection 'A For orders ou CMA No.13o /2OI9 (5i CPC) For orders on CMA No75 /2on9 (51 CPC) For orders On CMA No.376 /2018 (E/A) For orders on CMA No.339 /2018 (5I CPC) FUr oruers on C 1 N0.364 /2018 (151 CPC For orders on CMA No-39O /2D18 (5i CPC For orders on CMA No-39i /2018 (5- CPC) For orders on CM.A No.392 /2018 (1 Ro) For orders on CM1 No393 /2OIB(5i CPC) For orders On CMA No.394 /2018 (0/0 39 R1& 2) For Hearing of CM,4 No,199 2017 (U/0 39 R1&2) For Hearing %f ain 13:01.2020 MT.ibdul Raliman Bhutto, advocate for the appellant Mr Ghulam Dastagir A Shahani, ndvocate fOr respundont Mr Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General This Secund Civil Appeal is directed the Judgment utud 20.01.2017, whcreby the learned Ist Additional District Judgu Kandhkot while dismissing the Civil appeal Nooi of ZOI6, filed by the appellant, mainained the Judgment and 0٥C٥C duted 07.06.2016, thereby thc learned Senior Civil Judge, Kandhkot dismissed the FC, Suit Noo7/ 2O14, filed by the appellant So far as the title of this Second Civil Appeal is concerned, أt appeas to huite been filed on behalf uf Dr Waqar-ul Islat Plaintiff however, it has been signed as appellant by Muhammad Khalid Amin, the respondcnt No 2, wno has already maintained against the said Judgient IInd Civil Appea uf 2UI7, so also he has sworn the affidavit int support of this appeal and engaged Ms Yasir Ahmed Shah and Associates for filing of this appeal on behalf of the appellant Since is ati adinitted pusition that neither Dr Waqaraul Islam has signed the Ictnio of appeal nor Sworn the affidavit nor even engaged the counsel to file this appcal this appeal being filed incomputently is dismissed alongwith the pending applications nuge ل اا 9-0!1 كە ١٥،1 against 5-01
